---
title: "Josiah Johnston"
description: ""
image: /files/headshots/josiah-johnston.jpg
author: "Guest Speaker"
date: "2024-09-09"
categories: [Climate and Career]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.linkedin.com/in/josiah-johnston  #linkedin profile or personal website
      image: /files/headshots/josiah-johnston.jpg
      title: "Josiah Johnston"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Daikin"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title



### Time

Monday, Date, 6:00PM - 7:00PM

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please [register](https://forms.gle/65hnhJPmnYaz5utG9) to participate.

## About



## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio



<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
